description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service and sets DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay2. Define a single stage named build_base and include a before_script that runs docker info. Add a build_laravel-ci job in the build_base stage that runs docker build -t claystation/laravel-gitlab-ci-docker ., then docker login -u ${docker_username} -p ${docker_password}, and finally docker push claystation/laravel-gitlab-ci-docker. The job has no caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
